items.title: Limit Intuition Note

items.body: Use this note when students need a conceptual bridge before symbolic limit rules.

items.title: Study Routine for Worked Practice
items.description: Shared note on how to study examples, practice, and reflection tasks across weeks.
items.body: Preview the topic, attempt one example independently, compare reasoning, and finish with a reflection note.
